calendar.matters:
Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, as follows:

Plaintiff Barclays Bank Delaware's unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
